name: Advance America
description_short: Bowling Green, KY Advance America payday loan store at 2710 Nashville Rd offers fast cash advances and same-day title loans.
description_long:
Advance America at 2710 Nashville Rd Ste 107 in Bowling Green, KY is a standalone payday loan storefront located conveniently for residents in the area. The store is open Monday through Friday from 10 AM to 6 PM, and Saturdays from 10 AM to 1 PM, providing flexible hours for working adults in Bowling Green who need quick access to emergency cash.

This Bowling Green location offers payday loans, cash advances, and title loans to qualified borrowers. The team here can process applications quickly — call +1 270-781-1880 to speak with a representative about your options and current lending terms.

If you live in Bowling Green and face an unexpected expense before your next paycheck, this location provides a direct alternative to traditional bank loans. Bring a valid ID, proof of income, and an active checking account — most approvals happen the same day.
address: 2710 Nashville Rd Ste 107, Bowling Green, KY 42101

company_info.headquarters: 2710 Nashville Rd Ste 107, Bowling Green, KY 42101

pros: Same-day loan funding available both online and in-store
Wide product range from $100 payday loans to $25,000 title loans accommodating different needs
Physical store locations with trained staff for in-person consultation and application
Flexible installment loans allowing repayment over multiple periods (vs. lump-sum payday loans)
High customer satisfaction rating: 4.9/5 stars across 125,594 verified reviews
Extended hours (open 9am–6pm Friday, 9am–4pm Saturday) for working customers
cons: No APR or fee information disclosed on website, making true cost comparison impossible for consumers
Title loans require vehicle collateral, creating risk of vehicle repossession if unable to repay
Payday and installment loans max out at $1,000, insufficient for larger emergency expenses
Short 2–4 week payday loan terms can trap consumers in debt cycles requiring renewals
Requires checking account and full documentation (ID, income proof, SSN), excluding unbanked populations
best_for: Employed individuals facing unexpected $100–$500 emergency expenses before next paycheck
Consumers with poor credit unable to qualify for bank personal loans or credit cards
Vehicle owners needing $2,000–$25,000 for urgent expenses and willing to use car title as collateral
diagnosis: Advance America is designed for employed individuals facing genuine short-term cash emergencies ($100–$1,000) or larger urgent needs secured by vehicle title ($2,000–$25,000). The critical caveat is that payday and title loans carry high implicit interest rates and fees—not disclosed on this website—and should only be used for true emergencies, as repeated renewals or defaults can lead to significant debt accumulation or vehicle loss.
services: In-store loan applications and same-day funding

cfpb_data.cfpb_company_name: Advance America, Cash Advance Centers, Inc.
